name: Morpho Vault Manager
description: Onboard and operate a constrained Morpho vault manager agent on OpenClaw.

profilePath.description: Default profile path for the vault manager.

workspaceRoot.description: Root directory used for generated agent workspaces.

baseRpcUrl.description: Optional Base RPC URL used for receipt verification and live transaction broadcast.

defaultCron.description: Default cron expression for periodic rebalancing.

defaultTimezone.description: Default IANA timezone for cron schedules.

defaultDeliveryMode.description: Default cron delivery mode for new vault-manager profiles.

defaultDeliveryChannel.description: Default cron delivery channel. Use "last" to route through OpenClaw's last-known chat target.

defaultDeliveryTo.description: Default cron delivery destination for explicit delivery targets.

defaultDeliveryAccountId.description: Optional default OpenClaw channel account id for multi-account delivery.

defaultTokenEnvVar.description: Environment variable name expected to hold the OWS API token.

apiKey.description: OWS API token source. A bare string is treated as an env-var name. Objects with {source:'env', id} read an env var; {source:'file', path, mode?, jsonField?} read from a file (singleValue or json).

dryRunByDefault.description: Whether live execution should remain opt-in.
